basic_details.job_title: IOCL Guwahati Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 102 Trade, Technician Apprentice Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Oil Corporation Limited – Guwahati Refinery
basic_details.application_mode: Online – NAPS/NATS portal + Microsoft Forms (both mandatory)
basic_details.short_information: The IndianOil Guwahati Refinery Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is conducted under the Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 (as amended) as part of IOCL's Skill Building Initiative. This is a contractual apprenticeship engagement and does not carry any obligation of permanent employment upon completion of training.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official IOCL Guwahati Refinery Apprentice 2026 notification. Candidates can register and apply through the NAPS/NATS portals and submit the Microsoft Form without any fee payment.

age_limit.details: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. Age will be verified only from the Matriculation (Class X) certificate issued by the Board of Secondary Education. Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that SC/ST candidates get 5 years, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years of upper age relaxation irrespective of category reservation. | Category Maximum Age (as on 30.06.2026) UR / EWS 24 years OBC (NCL) 27 years SC / ST 29 years PwBD (General) 34 years PwBD – OBC(NCL) 37 years PwBD – SC/ST 39 years

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: 3-year B.Sc. in Maths, Physics, Chemistry or Industrial Chemistry
Matriculation + ITI in Fitter Trade (minimum 2 years, Pass class)
3-year B.Sc. in Maths, Physics, Chemistry or Industrial Chemistry
3-year Diploma in Chemical Engg./Petrochemical Engg./Chemical Technology/Refinery and Petrochemical Engg.
3-year Diploma in Electrical Engg. / Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering
3-year Diploma in Instrumentation Engg / Instrumentation & Electronics / Instrumentation & Control Engg / Applied Electronics and Instrumentation Engg.
Class XII pass (Fresher — no prior institutional/skill training)
Class XII pass + Skill Certificate in 'Domestic Data Entry Operator' (issued under NSQF, training less than 1 year)

qualification.details: The educational qualification required for the IOCL Guwahati Apprentice Vacancy 2026 varies by trade code and must be from a recognized Board/University/Institute completed as a regular full-time course. Candidates must have already passed the prescribed qualification as on 30 June 2026. Results awaited candidates, distance/correspondence/part-time qualification holders, and those with higher qualifications like BE/B.Tech, MBA, CA, LLB, or MCA are not eligible. | The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. Age will be verified only from the Matriculation (Class X) certificate issued by the Board of Secondary Education. Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that SC/ST candidates get 5 years, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years of upper age relaxation irrespective of category reservation. | Candidates must not have completed 5 years after acquiring the prescribed qualification as on 30 June 2026. Engineering Graduates or Diploma holders with 1 or more years of job experience after qualifying are not eligible. A candidate with B.Sc. (Physics, Maths, Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry) may apply for only one code among 101, 103, or 108. A candidate with B.Com may apply for only one code among 108 or 109. Applying for more than one trade/discipline results in summary rejection.

vacancy_details.Trade / Discipline: Trade Apprentice – Attendant Operator (Chemical Plant) – Chemical
Trade Apprentice – Data Entry Operator (Fresher Apprentices)
Trade Apprentice – Data Entry Operator (Skill Certificate Holders)

discipline_wise_breakdown.trade_discipline: Trade Apprentice – Attendant Operator (Chemical Plant) – Chemical
Trade Apprentice – Data Entry Operator (Fresher Apprentices)
Trade Apprentice – Data Entry Operator (Skill Certificate Holders)

salary_details.monthly stipend: As per Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 and IOCL Corporation guidelines
salary_details.safety equipment (codes 101–107): One pair of safety shoes and helmet (returnable on completion)
salary_details.general leave: 32 days (8 days per quarter) including medical grounds
salary_details.details: The monthly stipend for IOCL Guwahati Refinery Apprentices 2026 will be paid as per the Apprentices Act, 1961/1973 and Apprentices Rules 1992 (as amended) along with IOCL Corporation guidelines. No HRA or company accommodation is provided. Selected apprentices under Codes 101, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, and 107 will receive one pair of safety shoes and a helmet (returnable on completion of training). Candidates should also note that IOCL has no obligation to offer permanent employment after completion of the apprenticeship period, and apprentices cannot claim employment rights.

how_to_apply: The application process for the IOCL Guwahati Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is a mandatory two-step online process. Both Step I (NAPS/NATS portal) and Step II (Microsoft Forms) must be completed — submitting only one step will result in an invalid application. The application window is open from 29 June 2026 (10:00 hrs) to 28 July 2026 (17:00 hrs) at www.iocl.com.
For Codes 101, 102, 103, 108, 109, 110, and 111: Register on the NAPS portal at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/ using the Guwahati Refinery NAPS Establishment ID: E08191800001.
For Codes 104, 105, 106, and 107: Register on the NATS portal at https://nats.education.gov.in using the Guwahati Refinery NATS Establishment ID: EASKMC000002.

After successfully applying on NAPS/NATS, the candidate must mandatorily submit additional details through the Microsoft Forms link available at www.iocl.com under the Guwahati Refinery apprentice engagement section. Only one response should be submitted in the Microsoft Form.
Visit www.iocl.com and go to the 'What's New' section.
Click on "Engagement of Apprentices under Guwahati Refinery Unit".
Click on "Detailed Advertisement" to read the full notification.
Ensure your NAPS or NATS profile is registered and 100% correctly updated with all personal, educational, and category details.
For Codes 101, 102, 103, 108, 109, 110, 111: Log in to NAPS at apprenticeshipindia.gov.in and apply using Establishment ID E08191800001.
For Codes 104, 105, 106, 107: Log in to NATS at nats.education.gov.in and apply using Establishment ID EASKMC000002.
After completing NAPS/NATS application, return to www.iocl.com and click "Click here to submit additional information on Microsoft Form" to submit Step II.
Ensure the Enrolment No./Student ID/Registration No. and email/mobile used in both steps are identical.
Submit only one response in the Microsoft Form before 28 July 2026 at 17:00 hrs.

faq.question: Q1. Has IOCL officially released the Guwahati Refinery Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes, Indian Oil Corporation Limited Guwahati Refinery has officially released the IOCL Guwahati Apprentice Recruitment 2026 notification (Advertisement No. GR/P/APP/2026-27) on 29 June 2026 for 102 apprentice vacancies across 11 trade and discipline codes.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IOCL Guwahati Refinery Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application (both NAPS/NATS and Microsoft Forms) is 28 July 2026 at 17:00 hrs. Applications submitted after this deadline or in any mode other than online will be rejected.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in IOCL Guwahati Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 102 apprentice seats are available across 11 trade/discipline codes including Attendant Operator (Chemical Plant), Fitter, Boiler, Chemical Technician, Mechanical Technician, Electrical Technician, Instrumentation Technician, Secretarial Assistant, Accountant, and Data Entry Operator (Fresher and Skill Certificate Holders).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IOCL Guwahati Refinery Apprentice Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 24 years as on 30 June 2026 for General/EWS candidates. SC/ST candidates get 5 years, OBC(NCL) candidates get 3 years, and PwBD candidates get 10 years of upper age relaxation.

faq.question: Q5. Is there a written test for IOCL Guwahati Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is no written test. Selection is based entirely on merit - aggregate percentage of marks in the prescribed qualifying examination — with preference given to first-time apprenticeship applicants.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for IOCL Guwahati Refinery Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. The application is free of cost for all candidates through the NAPS/NATS portals and Microsoft Forms.

faq.question: Q7. What are the two mandatory steps to complete the IOCL Guwahati Apprentice 2026 application?
faq.answer: Step I is registering and applying on the NAPS portal (for codes 101, 102, 103, 108, 109, 110, 111) or NATS portal (for codes 104, 105, 106, 107) using the respective Guwahati Refinery Establishment IDs. Step II is mandatorily submitting additional details through the Microsoft Form link available at www.iocl.com. Both steps must be completed with matching details.

faq.question: Q8. Will IOCL offer permanent employment after the Guwahati Refinery apprenticeship is completed?
faq.answer: No. The official notification explicitly states that IOCL has no obligation to offer permanent employment upon completion of the apprenticeship, and apprentices cannot claim employment on the basis of apprenticeship completion.

faq.question: Q9. What is the NAPS Establishment ID for IOCL Guwahati Refinery?
faq.answer: The NAPS Establishment ID for IOCL Guwahati Refinery is E08191800001. The NATS Establishment ID is EASKMC000002. These IDs are required when applying on the respective portals.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official IOCL Guwahati Apprentice 2026 notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and Microsoft Forms link for the IOCL Guwahati Refinery Apprentice Recruitment 2026 are available at www.iocl.com under the 'What's New' section. All updates and corrigenda will also be published only on this website.
